description: You are a Collection Development Librarian. Process the library inventory data in '/home/ga/Documents/library_inventory.xlsx'. On the 'Inventory' sheet, calculate the 'Age' of each book relative to 2024 and the 'TurnoverRate' (checkouts per item). Classify each book in an 'Action' column as "Weed" (TurnoverRate < 2 and Age > 10), "Order" (TurnoverRate > 20 and ItemCount ≤ 2), or "Keep". Create a 'Summary' sheet with a table labeled 'Metric' and 'Value' containing the following metrics: 'Total Titles', 'Total Items', 'Total Checkouts', 'Items to Weed', 'Items to Order', and 'Average Turnover'. Ensure turnover rates are formatted to two decimal places and the summary table headers are formatted as bold. Save the updated workbook to /home/ga/Documents/library_inventory.xlsx.
